_comment: Adriana FLOORPLAN data package for the Celebration Homes AI advisor demo. Specs, dimensions, elevations, and options are transcribed from the official Adriana brochure (Revised 8/20/2022, (c) 2022 Celebration Homes LLC). NO PRICING is published by Celebration; per Greg, pricing is handled by a sales agent, so price fields are intentionally omitted and the advisor must defer cost questions to Greg (see pricing_policy). This file replaces 06-adriana-data.sample.json and keeps the same shape.

source.disclaimer: All specifications, features, equipment, landscape plans, dimensions, and prices are subject to change without notice. This is not part of a legal contract. All elevations are to be considered artist renderings and not deemed accurate to actual plans and specifications.

pricing_policy.rule: Do NOT quote prices, price ranges, or option costs. Celebration Homes does not publish pricing; all pricing is handled one-on-one by a sales agent. If the buyer asks what something costs, acknowledge the question warmly, describe the feature, and route them to Greg Welton for current pricing and incentives.

community.name: Ashlyn
community.area: Fairview, Williamson County, Middle Tennessee (Nashville metro)
community.lifestyle_summary: Ashlyn is set in Fairview in Williamson County, giving buyers a quieter, more spacious setting with quick access to lakes, parks, and recreation, plus an easy drive to Franklin shopping and dining. It pairs small-town surroundings with the highly regarded Williamson County school district.

amenities_and_nearby._note: Points of interest near the Ashlyn community. Use these to help buyers picture the lifestyle and location. Do not state exact distances or drive times unless asked to confirm with an agent.

lakes_and_outdoors.name: Bowie Nature Park
lakes_and_outdoors.notes: Large Fairview nature park with trails, lakes, and outdoor programs

shopping_and_dining.name: Shopping Centers
shopping_and_dining.notes: Everyday retail and grocery options in the area

shopping_and_dining.name: Cool Springs Galleria
shopping_and_dining.notes: Major mall in Franklin/Cool Springs with national retailers and dining

shopping_and_dining.name: Downtown Franklin
shopping_and_dining.notes: Historic Main Street with boutiques, restaurants, and events

schools._note: Ashlyn is served by the Williamson County school district. Share these schools when buyers ask about education; for current attendance-zone confirmation, enrollment, and ratings, route the buyer to Greg or the district.

floorplan.name: The Adriana

square_footage.note: Optional 11' vaulted ceiling adds approx. 14-25 sq.ft. depending on elevation; optional bath off Bedroom 5 adds approx. 50 sq.ft.

floorplan.timeline_note: Built to order. Most Celebration homes take roughly 6-12 months from contract to move-in depending on selections and homesite. Confirm current build timing with Greg.
highlights: Owner's retreat on the main level with 10' tray ceiling
Open kitchen with walk-in pantry and optional islands
Main-level study (can convert to a downstairs bedroom)
Upstairs play room with vaulted ceiling and balcony overlooking the great room

main_level.name: Owner's Bath
main_level.notes: 60" x 42" acrylic shower pan with tiled walls and seat; optional garden tub; optional window

main_level.name: Kitchen
main_level.notes: Walk-in pantry with (5) 16" shelves; optional oven/microwave, optional island, optional butler's pantry

main_level.name: Study
main_level.notes: Optional French doors; can convert to main-level Bedroom 2

main_level.name: Foyer / Entry
main_level.notes: Optional wrap porch / covered porch at entry

upper_level.name: Bedroom 5 (optional)
upper_level.notes: Optional double doors; optional bath off Bedroom 5 (adds ~50 sq.ft.)

upper_level.name: Bath
upper_level.notes: Upstairs hall bath with linen closet

upper_level.name: Play Room
upper_level.notes: Balcony; optional 10" tray ceiling; open to great room below

structural_options.name: Optional main-level full bath (in lieu of coat closet)
Optional 11' vaulted ceiling (Bedroom 4)
structural_options.note: Adds ~25 sq.ft. on Elevation A, ~14 sq.ft. on Elevation B

structural_options.name: Optional 10" tray ceiling in play room

kitchen_options.name: Deeper island with 12" cabinets on the great room side
Optional cooktop in lieu of range
